context.note: No database migrations required - failure rate is calculated from existing data

severity_thresholds.threshold: failure_rate less than or equal to 5%
failure_rate less than or equal to 15%

objective.goal: Calculate failure rate as a core dashboard metric
Display failure rate in stats cards
Add failure rate trend to visualizations

success_criteria.criterion: Failure rate displays correctly in stats cards
Failure rate updates with date filter
Trend chart shows average reference line

endpoint.description: Get dashboard metrics including failure rate

testing_checklist.test: Failure rate displays correctly in stats cards
Failure rate updates with date filter
Trend chart shows average reference line

implementation_prompt.next_phase: Phase 05: Error Pattern Grouping - Cluster similar errors to identify systemic issues
